{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":213690,"duration_api_ms":206467,"num_turns":29,"result":"Step 6 is complete. Here's what was built:

**Files created:**

- `supabase/migrations/0003_storage.sql` — creates the public `snapshots` bucket (must be applied manually in Supabase dashboard SQL editor)
- `src/components/cam/WebcamCapture.tsx` — client component: getUserMedia preview, capture-to-canvas, POST to API, status display, optional auto-capture every 60s
- `src/app/cam/[kind]/page.tsx` — server page; validates `kind` is `pill`|`pantry`, 404 otherwise
- `src/app/api/vision/capture/route.ts` — POST handler: loads patient + prescription, calls Gemini, uploads snapshot to Supabase Storage, inserts `events` row, enqueues outbox iMessage
- `demos/phase-0-smoke.TODO` — manual recording instructions (can't automate a screen capture)
- `README.md` — appended "Running the smoke test" section

**Results:** 21 tests passing, typecheck clean.
